lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਅਵਰੁ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਨ ਧਿਆਨੁ ਪੂਜਾ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਵਸਿ ਰਹੇ ॥
lines.translit: mai avar giaan na dhiaan poojaa har naam antar vas rahe |
lines.english: I have no other spiritual wisdom, meditation or worship; the Name of the Lord alone dwells deep within me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੇਖੁ ਭਵਨੀ ਹਠੁ ਨ ਜਾਨਾ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਸਚੁ ਗਹਿ ਰਹੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bhekh bhavanee hatth na jaanaa naanakaa sach geh rahe |1|
lines.english: I know nothing about religious robes, pilgrimages or stubborn fanaticism; O Nanak, I hold tight to the Truth. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਿੰਨੜੀ ਰੈਣਿ ਭਲੀ ਦਿਨਸ ਸੁਹਾਏ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: bhinarree rain bhalee dinas suhaae raam |
lines.english: The night is beautiful, drenched with dew, and the day is delightful,

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਸੂਤੜੀਏ ਪਿਰਮੁ ਜਗਾਏ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: nij ghar sootarree piram jagaae raam |
lines.english: when her Husband Lord wakes the sleeping soul-bride, in the home of the self.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਵ ਹਾਣਿ ਨਵ ਧਨ ਸਬਦਿ ਜਾਗੀ ਆਪਣੇ ਪਿਰ ਭਾਣੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: nav haan nav dhan sabad jaagee aapane pir bhaaneea |
lines.english: The young bride has awakened to the Word of the Shabad; she is pleasing to her Husband Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਜਿ ਕੂੜੁ ਕਪਟੁ ਸੁਭਾਉ ਦੂਜਾ ਚਾਕਰੀ ਲੋਕਾਣੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: taj koorr kapatt subhaau doojaa chaakaree lokaaneea |
lines.english: So renounce falsehood, fraud, love of duality and working for people.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਹਾਰੁ ਕੰਠੇ ਸਾਚ ਸਬਦੁ ਨੀਸਾਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: mai naam har kaa haar kantthe saach sabad neesaaniaa |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord is my necklace, and I am anointed with the True Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰ ਜੋੜਿ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਸਾਚੁ ਮਾਗੈ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਣਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kar jorr naanak saach maagai nadar kar tudh bhaaniaa |2|
lines.english: With his palms pressed together, Nanak begs for the gift of the True Name; please, bless me with Your Grace, through the pleasure of Your Will. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਸੁਣਿ ਮੰਨਿਅੜੀ ਅਕਥ ਕਹਾਣੀ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: jin sun maniarree akath kahaanee raam |
lines.english: Listen, and place your faith in the Unspoken Speech of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਗੁ ਸਲੋਨੜੀਏ ਬੋਲੈ ਗੁਰਬਾਣੀ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: jaag salonarree bolai gurabaanee raam |
lines.english: Awake, O bride of splendored eyes, and chant the Word of the Guru's Bani.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਮਾਏ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਏ ਤ੍ਰਿਭਵਣ ਸੋਝੀ ਸੂਝਏ ॥
lines.translit: ohu sabad samaae aap gavaae tribhavan sojhee soojhe |
lines.english: Merging in the Word of the Shabad, self-conceit is eradicated, and the three worlds are revealed to her understanding.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਕਥ ਕਹਾਣੀ ਪਦੁ ਨਿਰਬਾਣੀ ਕੋ ਵਿਰਲਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬੂਝਏ ॥
lines.translit: akath kahaanee pad nirabaanee ko viralaa guramukh boojhe |
lines.english: The Unspoken Speech, the state of Nirvaanaa - how rare is the Gurmukh who understands this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਹੈ ਅਤੀਤੁ ਅਪਰੰਪਰਿ ਰਾਤਾ ਸਾਚੁ ਮਨਿ ਗੁਣ ਸਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: rahai ateet aparanpar raataa saach man gun saariaa |
lines.english: Remaining detached, with infinity infusing, the true mind cherishes the virtues of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹੁ ਪੂਰਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਰਬ ਠਾਈ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਉਰਿ ਧਾਰਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: ohu poor rahiaa sarab tthaaee naanakaa ur dhaariaa |3|
lines.english: He is fully pervading and permeating all places; Nanak has enshrined Him within his heart. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਮਨਿ ਰਹਸੀ ਸੀਝਸਿ ਦੇਹੀ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: guramat man rahasee seejhas dehee raam |
lines.english: Following the Guru's Teachings, your mind shall be delighted, and your body shall be fulfilled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਲਿ ਬੁਲਾਇੜੀਏ ਭਗਤਿ ਸਨੇਹੀ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: mehal bulaaeirree bhagat sanehee raam |
lines.english: The Lord is calling you to the Mansion of His Presence; O soul-bride, He is the Lover of His devotees.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਡੀਗਿ ਡੋਲਿ ਨ ਜਾਇ ਕਤ ਹੀ ਆਪਣਾ ਪਿਰੁ ਜਾਣਏ ॥
lines.translit: man ddeeg ddol na jaae kat hee aapanaa pir jaane |
lines.english: Her mind shall not waver or wander anywhere else, when she comes to know her Husband Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਮਾਰਿ ਰੀਝੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੀਝੈ ਤ੍ਰੈ ਲੋਕ ਨਾਥੁ ਪਛਾਣਏ ॥
lines.translit: man maar reejhai sabad seejhai trai lok naath pachhaane |
lines.english: Conquer and subdue your mind, and love the Word of the Shabad; reform yourself, and realize the Lord of the three worlds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਆਧਾਰੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਤੂ ਖਸਮੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਮੈ ਤਾਣੁ ਤਕੀਆ ਤੇਰਓ ॥
lines.translit: mai aadhaar teraa too khasam meraa mai taan takeea tero |
lines.english: You are my only Support, You are my Lord and Master. You are my strength and anchor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚਿ ਸੂਚਾ ਸਦਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਝਗਰੁ ਨਿਬੇਰਓ ॥੪॥੨॥
lines.translit: saach soochaa sadaa naanak gur sabad jhagar nibero |4|2|
lines.english: She is forever truthful and pure, O Nanak; through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, conflicts are resolved. ||4||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੰਤ ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ਮੰਗਲ ॥
lines.translit: chhant bilaaval mahalaa 4 mangal |
lines.english: Chhant, Bilaaval, Fourth Mehl, Mangal ~ The Song Of Joy:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰਾ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸੇਜੈ ਆਇਆ ਮਨੁ ਸੁਖਿ ਸਮਾਣਾ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: meraa har prabh sejai aaeaa man sukh samaanaa raam |
lines.english: My Lord God has come to my bed, and my mind is merged with the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਤੁਠੈ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਲੀਆ ਮਾਣਾ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: gur tutthai har prabh paaeaa rang raleea maanaa raam |
lines.english: As it pleases the Guru, I have found the Lord God, and I revel and delight in His Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਹਰਿ ਸੋਹਾਗੁ ਹੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਣਾ ਰਾਮ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har prabh har sohaag hai naanak man bhaanaa raam |1|
lines.english: The Lord, the Lord God, is Nanak's Husband Lord, pleasing to his mind. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਭਾਗੀਆ ਸੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਹਰਿ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਮਾਣਾ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: vaddabhaageea sohaaganee har masatak maanaa raam |
lines.english: Very fortunate are those happy soul-brides, who have the jewel of the Naam upon their foreheads.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿੰਮਾਣਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਮਾਣੁ ਹੈ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਹਰਿ ਆਪੈ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: ninmaaniaa har maan hai har prabh har aapai raam |
lines.english: The Lord is the honor of the dishonored. The Lord, the Lord God is Himself by Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ਨਿਤ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਾਪੈ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh aap gavaaeaa nit har har jaapai raam |
lines.english: The Gurmukh eradicates self-conceit, and constantly chants the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਸਹਜਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਰਸਿ ਹਰਿ ਧ੍ਰਾਪੈ ਰਾਮ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jan naanak sehaj milaaeaa har ras har dhraapai raam |2|
lines.english: Servant Nanak is easily merged into the Celestial Lord. He is satisfied with the sublime essence of the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਕਰੈ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਪੈ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: mere har prabh bhaavai so karai har rang har raapai raam |
lines.english: My Lord God does whatever He pleases; the Lord imbues mortal beings with the color of His Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮਿਲੁ ਸੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਰੰਗੁ ਹੋਇ ਘਣੇਰਾ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh mil sohaaganee rang hoe ghaneraa raam |
lines.english: As Gurmukhs, the happy soul-brides meet Him, and their love for Him is abundant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਣਸ ਜਨਮਿ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਵਣ ਵੇਰਾ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: maanas janam har paaeeai har raavan veraa raam |
lines.english: The Lord is found only through this human incarnation. This is the time to contemplate the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਮਾਣਸ ਜਨਮਿ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ਤਿਨੑ ਭਾਗੁ ਮੰਦੇਰਾ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: jin maanas janam na paaeaa tina bhaag manderaa raam |
lines.english: Those who have not attained human incarnation, are cursed by evil destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਖੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਜਨੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਰਾਮ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: har har har har raakh prabh naanak jan teraa raam |3|
lines.english: O Lord, God, Har, Har, Har, Har, save Nanak; he is Your humble servant. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਅਗਮੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਇਆ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਰੰਗਿ ਭੀਨਾ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: gur har prabh agam drirraaeaa man tan rang bheenaa raam |
lines.english: The Guru has implanted within me the Name of the Inaccessible Lord God; my mind and body are drenched with the Lord's Love.
